tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 Apply Relative Date Filter
trigger_conditions: Use only after WBS09 capability map/discovery proves one exact manifest target uses filter.relative_date.on_or_before_today and current sort state is already correct. Applies or normalizes exactly one relative-date filter row for one view per run.
input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT, DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR, Node.js, Playwright prerequisites, Airtable login in Chrome profile or CDP session, wbs09_airtable_native_views_manifest.json, optional wbs09_airtable_capability_map.generated.json, one TargetKey, and exact ConfirmToken APPLY_WBS09_RELATIVE_DATE_FILTER. Default launcher behavior pauses for operator Enter before browser launch; -NoOperatorReadyPause may be used only for reviewed automation.
output_contract: Writes dcoir_wbs09_apply_relative_date_filter_* under DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR with launcher log, before/post/after-reload panel readback JSON, DOM/screenshot evidence when enabled, action report, and apply_relative_date_filter_rollup.json. Package with New-DcoirChatGPTFriendlyZip.ps1.
safety_preconditions: One target only. Relative-date filter only. Refuses multi-filter manifest targets, multi-sort manifest targets, unexpected existing filter rows, and targets with sort gaps. Does not create/delete views, edit records/tables/fields, or run broad rollout. Requires independent after-reload readback before promotion claims. Browser launch is bounded by BrowserLaunchTimeoutSeconds and logs a clear timeout instead of hanging silently. Readback includes bounded retry/reopen extraction for Airtable filter/sort panels before any mutation decision.
